description: Multiple cross-site scripting vulnerabilities in ASPRunner 2.4 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the (1) SearchFor parameter in [TABLE-NAME]_search.asp, (2) SQL parameter in [TABLE-NAME]_edit.asp, (3) SearchFor parameter in [TABLE]_list.asp, or (4) SQL parameter in export.asp.
